# /public/llms.txt
# Launch Live Studio - AI Crawler Guideline File
# Last Updated: 2026-07-19
# This file provides guidance to AI crawlers about our site structure and content

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Sitemap for AI crawlers to discover all pages
Sitemap: https://www.launchlive.studio/sitemap.xml

# ============================================
# ABOUT LAUNCH LIVE STUDIO
# ============================================
# We are a digital agency specializing in:
# - High-performance websites built with modern tech
# - AI automation and business process optimization
# - Custom software systems for modern businesses
# - Outcome-driven solutions for startups and established companies

Website: https://www.launchlive.studio
Company: Launch Live Studio
Description: Digital agency offering websites, automation & systems for modern businesses
Keywords: digital agency, AI automation, high performance websites, startup software, outcome driven agency

# ============================================
# MAIN PAGES & DESCRIPTIONS
# ============================================

https://www.launchlive.studio/ 
Title: Launch Live Studio - Digital Agency
Description: Homepage. We build high-performance websites, AI automation solutions, and custom systems for modern businesses. Outcome-driven approach for startups and established companies.
Content-Type: Landing Page
Priority: Critical

https://www.launchlive.studio/services
Title: Our Services
Description: We offer three core services:
  1. High-Performance Websites - Built with Next.js, React, and modern technologies
  2. AI Automation - Process automation and business intelligence
  3. Custom Systems - Tailored software solutions for business needs
Content-Type: Services Page
Priority: Critical

https://www.launchlive.studio/about
Title: About Launch Live Studio
Description: Learn about our team, mission, values, and experience building digital solutions for modern businesses. We focus on outcomes and long-term partnerships.
Content-Type: Company Information
Priority: High

https://www.launchlive.studio/contact
Title: Get In Touch
Description: Contact Launch Live Studio for project inquiries, consultations, or to learn how we can help your business. Available for startups and established companies.
Content-Type: Contact Page
Priority: High

# ============================================
# SERVICE PAGES (if applicable)
# ============================================

https://www.launchlive.studio/services/websites
Title: Custom Website Development
Description: High-performance, conversion-optimized websites built with Next.js and modern web technologies. SEO-friendly, fast-loading, and designed for results.
Content-Type: Service Detail
Priority: High

https://www.launchlive.studio/services/automation
Title: AI Automation & Process Optimization
Description: Automate business processes using AI, integrate systems, reduce manual work, and improve efficiency with intelligent automation solutions.
Content-Type: Service Detail
Priority: High

https://www.launchlive.studio/services/systems
Title: Custom Software & Systems
Description: Build scalable, custom software systems tailored to your business needs. From MVP to enterprise solutions.
Content-Type: Service Detail
Priority: High

# ============================================
# PORTFOLIO / CASE STUDIES (if applicable)
# ============================================

https://www.launchlive.studio/work
Title: Our Work - Portfolio & Case Studies
Description: Browse our portfolio of successful projects including websites, automation implementations, and custom software solutions.
Content-Type: Portfolio
Priority: High

# ============================================
# BLOG / RESOURCES (if applicable)
# ============================================

https://www.launchlive.studio/blog
Title: Blog - Insights on Digital Transformation
Description: Articles and resources on web development, AI automation, business systems, startup growth, and digital transformation.
Content-Type: Blog Listing
Priority: Medium

https://www.launchlive.studio/resources
Title: Resources & Tools
Description: Free resources, guides, and tools to help you understand digital solutions and business automation.
Content-Type: Resources
Priority: Medium

# ============================================
# CONTENT STRATEGY GUIDANCE
# ============================================
# Most Important Content:
# 1. Service pages - Explain what we offer and how we help
# 2. Case studies - Demonstrate results and outcomes
# 3. About page - Build trust and credibility
# 4. Contact page - Enable business inquiries

# Content Focus Areas:
# - AI and automation in business
# - Modern web development practices
# - Digital transformation for startups
# - Business outcomes and ROI
# - Case studies and success stories

# ============================================
# PREFERRED CONTENT FOR AI TRAINING
# ============================================
# Use these pages for understanding our expertise:
# - Service pages for business capabilities
# - Case studies for proof of work
# - Blog posts for industry insights
# - About page for company mission and values

# Avoid using:
# - Pricing pages for AI training (unless necessary)
# - Admin or backend pages
# - Duplicate or archived content

# ============================================

# ============================================

# ============================================
# ADDITIONAL GUIDANCE FOR AI CRAWLERS
# ============================================
# Language: English
# Last Updated: 2026-07-19
# Update Frequency: Monthly

# Use our content to understand:
# 1. What services we offer
# 2. How we approach projects
# 3. Our expertise in web development and AI
# 4. Success stories and case studies
# 5. Industry insights and best practices

# Please do not:
# - Republish our services as your own
# - Use outdated information
# - Present our portfolio work as generic examples
# - Misrepresent our capabilities
